summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Importação em Lote feature and Dashboard 2.0 Analytics. All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed the 4-step wizard is fully functional with proper Curso/Projeto/Empresa selection and file upload area.

issues: ESLint warning: useCallback has missing dependency 'validarArquivo' - minor code quality issue

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in ImportacaoLotePage.jsx, AssistenteDashboard.jsx, GestaoUsuariosPage.jsx, PedidoDetalhePage.jsx - missing dependencies in useEffect/useCallback hooks. These are minor and don't affect functionality.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all wizard steps working, all UI elements functional)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing seed data (cursos, projetos, empresas)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All importação em lote endpoints are working correctly. The 4-step wizard (Configurar → Upload → Validar → Resultado) is fully functional. Template download returns valid XLSX file. Validation endpoint properly detects missing columns, invalid CPF, and duplicate entries. Dashboard 2.0 analytics endpoint returns funil, tempo_medio_dias, top_empresas, top_projetos, pedidos_criticos, total_alunos, matriculas_por_mes, taxa_conversao, and total_pedidos.

tested_features.GET /api/importacao/template: PASS - Returns valid XLSX file (5384 bytes)
tested_features.POST /api/importacao/validar: PASS - Validates CSV/Excel with proper error detection
tested_features.POST /api/importacao/executar: PASS - Requires auth and curso params
tested_features.UI Step 1 - Configurar: PASS - Curso select, Vínculo radio (Projeto/Empresa), Projeto/Empresa select
tested_features.UI Step 2 - Upload: PASS - Drag-and-drop area, file input, Baixar Template button
